prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年清华大学在湖南省物理类最低录取位次分别为约86名、95名、95名、83名、98名，整体在80–100名区间窄幅波动，近5年均值约91名；2025年基准位 次约98名，较2024年（83名）后移15名，呈小幅波动回升态势；2021–2025年物理类招生计划分别为50人、49人、48人、47人、53人，2025年较2024年扩招6人；2026年计划54人，较2025年再增1人，连续两年小幅扩招，对竞争略有缓解但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 清华大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学 排名连续多年稳居第1名，属全国顶尖学府，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年高考周期内清华大学声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及校园管理类事件（校门开放、食 堂质量等），未见重大负面舆情；抖音热度总排名第2（高热），短视频曝光量极高，报考关注度持续旺盛。历史投档异常记录中无清华大学断档信号；清华大 学拥有大量A+/A/A-学科，包括计算机科学与技术（A+）、力学（A+）、材料科学与工程（A+）、电气工程（A+）、建筑学（A+）、临床医学（A+）等，A-及以上学科远超10个， 学科实力全国顶尖，对考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐，与清华大学优势学科高度重合；湖南省2026年物理 类考生约34.7万人，较2025年（约32.0万）增长约8.4%，竞争加剧；清华大学位于北京市，非本省高校；uni。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次窄幅波动、2026年招 生计划微扩1人、湖南省物理类考生大幅增长约8.4%以及清华大学持续高热关注度，考生规模增长是主要推动因素，预计2026年竞争较2025年略有加剧；预测最低位次约102名，区 间89–115名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间89–115名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如89名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（计算机类、临床医 学卓越医师）；位次接近区间上限（115名附近）建议以三档专业为主，兼顾二档中位次要求相对较低的专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Tsinghua University in Hunan Province's Physics Category were approximately 86, 95, 95, 83, and 98, respectively, fluctuating narrowly within the 80–100 range, with a 5-year average of about 91; the 2025 baseline ranking is approximately 98, moving back 15 places compared to 2024 (83), showing a slight fluctuating recovery trend; from 2021 to 2025, the Physics Category enrollment plans were 50, 49, 48, 47, and 53, respectively, with an expansion of 6 students in 2025 compared to 2024; the 2026 plan is 54 students, an increase of 1 more compared to 2025, with two consecutive years of slight expansion, slightly easing competition but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tsinghua University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, consistently ranking first in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings for many years, making it a top-tier institution in China, highly attractive to high-scoring students; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Tsinghua University's reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving campus management incidents (campus gate opening, cafeteria quality, etc.), with no major negative public opinion; Douyin heat ranking is 2nd (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure, indicating sustained strong application attention. There are no signals of a cutoff in historical admission anomaly records for Tsinghua University; Tsinghua University has a large number of A+/A/A- disciplines, including Computer Science and Technology (A+), Mechanics (A+), Materials Science and Engineering (A+), Electrical Engineering (A+), Architecture (A+), Clinical Medicine (A+), etc., with more than 10 disciplines rated A- or above, demonstrating top-tier academic strength nationwide, highly attractive to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, highly overlapping with Tsinghua University's advantageous disciplines; in 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Hunan Province is approximately 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% compared to 2025 (approximately 320,000), intensifying competition; Tsinghua University is located in Beijing, not a provincial university.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the narrow fluctuation of historical rankings, a slight expansion of 1 student in the 2026 enrollment plan, a significant increase of about 8.4% in Physics Category candidates in Hunan Province, and Tsinghua University's sustained high attention, the growth in candidate numbers is the main driving factor, with competition expected to slightly intensify in 2026 compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 102, with a range of 89–115.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Computer Science (including Computer Science and Technology, Computer Science Experimental Class)
- Automation (including Automation, Information Management and Information Systems)
- Electronic Information (including Electronic Information Science and Technology)
- Clinical Medicine (Outstanding Physician Scientist)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Physics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Manufacturing and Equipment)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Energy and Electrical)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Weixian College)
- Science Experimental Class (Economics, Finance, and Management)
- Law.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Civil Engineering (including Civil Engineering, Water Resources and Ocean Engineering)
- Science Experimental Class (Chemistry and Biology)
- Architecture (including Architecture, Urban and Rural Planning, Landscape Architecture)
- Clinical Medicine (Peking Union Medical College)
- Social Science Experimental Class (Zhishan College).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 89–115, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 majors as a stretch and Tier 3 majors as a safety net; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 89), prioritize Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer Science, Clinical Medicine Outstanding Physician); for rankings near the upper limit (around 115), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors, supplemented by Tier 2 majors with relatively lower ranking requirements.
